creator: euswdwj@exu.ericsson.se
text:
Dante is a circuit-level firewall/proxy that can be used
	to provide convenient and secure network connectivity to
	a wide range of hosts while requiring only the server Dante
	runs on to have external network connectivity.

	Once installed, Dante can in most cases be made transparent
	to the clients while offering detailed access control and
	logging facilities to the server administrator.

How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
